knowledgeScope.topic: Inspire or improve economic development, innovation and entrepreneurship policies and/or national strategies

programImpact.label: Influence or strengthen economic development, innovation and entrepreneurship strategies, initiatives, and projects

Expand your regional and international network of high-level decision-makers to advance your projects, enhance your events and or better position your company or institution in the Americas and beyond
Enhance your skills in economic development, innovation and entrepreneurship to further support the national or subnational economic development agenda
Learn about economic development best practices that can be replicated in your institution, your country and/or region
Better position your company or institution in the Americas and beyond
Learn about business soft-landing opportunities in Panama, and/or in other countries

qualitativeQuotes.name: William Patrick Murphy
qualitativeQuotes.text: Logistics industry is one where I see a lot of opportunities.

qualitativeQuotes.name: Ana María Gallado
qualitativeQuotes.text: New partnerships that will help build new Projects in innovation and entrepreneurship with an important impact in my country

qualitativeQuotes.name: Laura Del Castillo
qualitativeQuotes.text: Learning how other competitive institutions are transforming their scope and trying to replicate those practices

qualitativeQuotes.name: Sarah Tennant
qualitativeQuotes.text: Increased coordination with entities in the americas, Canada,Mexico and the Caribbean

qualitativeQuotes.name: Mikhail Bullard
qualitativeQuotes.text: Will use panama best practices as proposals for economic development; will look to establish partnerships with several participants

qualitativeQuotes.name: William Patrick Murphy
qualitativeQuotes.text: It has greatly enhanced my knowledge of the opportunities with Panamanian entrepreneurs.

qualitativeQuotes.name: Ana María Gallado
qualitativeQuotes.text: Definitely, It has given me more tools and knowledge and a strong network that will help me Meet new goals that i have for my institution

qualitativeQuotes.name: Laura Del Castillo
qualitativeQuotes.text: Yes, I’m more able to talk about topics I didn’t before Ace

qualitativeQuotes.name: Sarah Tennant
qualitativeQuotes.text: ACE has assisted in broadening my network within this space

qualitativeQuotes.name: Mikhail Bullard
qualitativeQuotes.text: Learnt best practices that are applicable to shared developmental challenges

qualitativeQuotes.name: Ana María Gallado
qualitativeQuotes.text: Partnerships with orner universities on research and international exchange programa and académico missions for the students and professors

qualitativeQuotes.name: Sarah Tennant
qualitativeQuotes.text: Yes we are looking to work with Aerialloop to establish potential coordination and pilots in Michigan

qualitativeQuotes.name: Mikhail Bullard
qualitativeQuotes.text: MoUs/ Partnership Agreements; trade facilitation and business collaboration support

qualitativeQuotes.name: Chris Brown
qualitativeQuotes.text: I believe there is great research already done by NADO that could be shared with rural areas to help with many of the problems we heard about. I feel NADO could also help compile and share other solutions from our partner countries .

qualitativeQuotes.name: Douglas Ovalle
qualitativeQuotes.text: Upcoming virtual meetings with plattforms developers to peruse future negotiations

qualitativeQuotes.name: Ana María Gallado
qualitativeQuotes.text: Yes It gave me an open perspective about the importance of circular economy and the role of the community private and public sector

qualitativeQuotes.name: Sarah Tennant
qualitativeQuotes.text: Yes the presentations helped to increase my knowledge of the importance and the ways to be more inclusive of this population moving forward

qualitativeQuotes.name: Mikhail Bullard
qualitativeQuotes.text: The inclusion of local entrepreneurs and their offerings as a part of sectoral presentations

qualitativeQuotes.name: Jeannette P Tamayo
qualitativeQuotes.text: Liked the presentations. Would have liked to see more Panamanian entrepreneurship earlier in the tour

qualitativeQuotes.name: Douglas Ovalle
qualitativeQuotes.text: Need to involve more companies and their decision makers to boost and implement economic development

qualitativeQuotes.name: Ana María Gallado
qualitativeQuotes.text: Continue to Connect in zoom sessions with the participants of every ace

qualitativeQuotes.name: Mikhail Bullard
qualitativeQuotes.text: Excellent coordination and agenda by panama as host and the OAS team but more time for engaging prospective partners and for breaks between visits on the early days could have enhanced delegate productivity

qualitativeQuotes.name: Douglas Ovalle
qualitativeQuotes.text: Like I said need more companies from private sector and their decision makers to be involved in the program

qualitativeQuotes.name: Luis Edgar Aparicio Pinto
qualitativeQuotes.text: It has been a great program, with an excellent agenda my congratulations. Thank you to the entire Foreign Ministry and OAS team.

qualitativeQuotes.name: Allyson Johnson
qualitativeQuotes.text: The team was amazing - it was great to finally see what ACE is all about and the team knocked it out of the park. The Panama hosts were so kind and inclusive, it was an honor to be a part of this all. The unique background of every guest brought an invaluable amount to the experience. The opportunity to connect with so many different people has brought renewed inspiration. Very well done team ACE, OAS and Panama!
